mapper.select: SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, START_NUMBER, END_NUMBER, QUANTITY, START_TIME workTime, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TRUST_ID, END_TIME workTimeEnd, POWER_ON_USER_ID, POWER_ON_USER_NAME, POWER_DIS_USER_ID, POWER_DIS_USER_NAME, MAGNI ratio FROM T_PRD_WATER_ELECTRICITY where TRUST_ID=#{trustId}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, START_NUMBER, END_NUMBER, QUANTITY, START_TIME workTime, END_TIME workTimeEnd, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TRUST_ID, POWER_ON_USER_ID, POWER_ON_USER_NAME, POWER_DIS_USER_ID, POWER_DIS_USER_NAME, MAGNI ratio FROM T_PRD_WATER_ELECTRICITY where ID=#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT STATUS FROM T_BUS_TRUST where ID=#{trustId}
SELECT ID "value",USER_NAME "text" FROM SYS_USER WHERE POST_CODE = 'DIANGONG'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_WATER_ELECTRICITY (ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, TRUST_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, START_NUMBER, END_NUMBER, QUANTITY, START_TIME, END_TIME, REMARK, POWER_ON_USER_ID, POWER_ON_USER_NAME, POWER_DIS_USER_ID, POWER_DIS_USER_NAME, MAGNI, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startNumber,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{endNumber,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{quantity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{workTimeEnd,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{powerOnUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{powerOnUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{powerDisUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{powerDisUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ratio,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT ID id, TRUST_ID, START_TIME workTime, END_TIME workTimeEnd, START_NUMBER, END_NUMBER, QUANTITY, MAGNI FROM T_PRD_WATER_ELECTRICITY where SHIPVOYAGE_ID=#{shipvoyageId}
